items.title: GPT‑Live
items.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-Live 语音模式，搭载 GPT-5.5
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches GPT-Live Voice Mode with GPT-5.5 Backing
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Live, a voice mode that leverages GPT-5.5 for enhanced background reasoning and extended conversations.

items.title: EU now one step away from reviving private message scanning rules
items.title_zh: 欧盟重启私密信息扫描法规
items.title_en: EU revives private message scanning rules
items.summary: The EU is one step away from reviving legislation that could mandate scanning of private messages, sparking concerns over privacy and encryption.

items.title: TypeScript 7
items.title_zh: TypeScript 7.0 发布，处理速度提升高达 12 倍
items.title_en: TypeScript 7.0 Announced with Up to 12x Faster Processing
items.summary: TypeScript 7.0 announced with significant performance improvements (up to 12x faster processing in benchmarks) and new features, generating substantial community engagement and discussion around compatibility and configuration pain points.

items.title: 📱 安卓高危漏洞曝光，点击恶意链接即可远程 Root 全版本安卓设备
items.title_zh: 安卓零点击远程Root漏洞链被曝光
items.title_en: Critical Android Zero-Click Remote Root Exploit Chain Discovered
items.summary: A security firm disclosed a zero-click remote root vulnerability chain affecting all Android versions up to Android 17, leveraging Firefox and a 15-year-old Linux kernel bug.

items.title: Chatto is now open source
items.title_en: Chatto Chat Application Goes Open Source
items.summary: Chatto, an easy-to-self-host chat application with per-user encryption, is now open source.

items.title: Grok 4.5
items.title_en: xAI Launches Grok 4.5 with 4x Efficiency Gain
items.summary: Grok 4.5 is announced, offering 4x better reasoning efficiency than Opus at lower cost, but faces ethical criticism from the community.

items.title: Mistral's Robostral Navigate: a state of the art robotics navigation model
items.title_zh: Mistral 发布 Robostral Navigate，一种无地图导航模型
items.title_en: Mistral Releases Robostral Navigate, a Map-Less Navigation Model
items.summary: Mistral releases Robostral Navigate, a state-of-the-art robotics navigation model capable of map-less navigation, sparking significant community discussion.

items.title: OpenBSD has a use-after-free allowing local privilege escalation to root
items.title_zh: OpenBSD 释放后重用漏洞导致本地权限提升至 root
items.title_en: OpenBSD use-after-free vulnerability enables local root privilege escalation
items.summary: A use-after-free vulnerability in OpenBSD allows local privilege escalation to root.

items.title: The classifiers Anthropic puts in front of Fable are too zealous
items.title_zh: Fable分类器过度敏感，误封正常查询
items.title_en: Fable Classifier Overzealously Blocks Legitimate Queries
items.summary: Users report that Anthropic's Fable classifier is overly sensitive, incorrectly flagging legitimate technical and scientific queries as violations and downgrading responses.

items.title: Cloudflare Meerkat - Globally distributed consensus
items.title_zh: Cloudflare Meerkat：首个生产级异步共识算法
items.title_en: Cloudflare Meerkat: First Production Asynchronous Consensus
items.summary: Cloudflare introduces Meerkat, a globally distributed consensus algorithm that is the first production implementation of asynchronous consensus (QuePaxa), enabling progress under wild message delays but requiring global consensus for reads.

items.title: LingBot-Video: sparse-MoE video diffusion transformer (13B total, 1.4B active) post-trained as an action-conditioned world model[R]
items.title_zh: LingBot-Video：稀疏专家混合视频扩散世界模型
items.title_en: LingBot-Video: Sparse-MoE Video Diffusion World Model
items.summary: A 13B sparse-MoE video diffusion transformer with RL post-training for action-conditioned world modeling, released openly with community discussion on its evaluation.

items.title: Reducing drift in interactive world-model rollouts: a mixed bidirectional/autoregressive attention mask + distillation over long self-rollouts[R]
items.title_zh: 混合注意力掩码与蒸馏减少交互式世界模型中的漂移
items.title_en: Mixed attention mask and distillation reduce drift in interactive world models
items.summary: Introduces a mixed attention mask and distillation over long self-rollouts to reduce drift in interactive world-model rollouts.

items.title: 🤖 DeepSeek 正在自研 AI 芯片，以减少对英伟达和华为的依赖  三位知情人士透露，中国 AI 公司 DeepSeek 正在开发自己的 AI 芯片，旨在
items.title_zh: DeepSeek 自研 AI 推理芯片
items.title_en: DeepSeek Developing Its Own AI Inference Chip
items.summary: DeepSeek is developing its own AI inference chip to reduce reliance on Nvidia and Huawei amid export restrictions.

items.title: 阿里下令全员卸载 Claude，7 月 10 日立即生效  阿里巴巴内部宣布反向禁用 Claude，要求员工卸载 Anthropic 相关产品，包括 Sonne
items.title_zh: 阿里下令员工卸载Claude，禁令7月10日生效
items.title_en: Alibaba Orders Employees to Uninstall Claude, Ban Effective July 10
items.summary: Alibaba has ordered all employees to uninstall Claude and other Anthropic products, following Anthropic's accusations of fraudulent account usage.

items.title: 📱 Meta 智能眼镜检测到隐私灯被破坏后，将自动关闭摄像头
items.title_zh: Meta智能眼镜若隐私灯被破坏将自动关闭摄像头
items.title_en: Meta smart glasses auto-disable camera if privacy light tampered
items.summary: Meta's smart glasses will auto-disable the camera if the privacy light is tampered with, addressing privacy concerns and recording abuse.

items.title: 研究人员可通过电磁信号识别手机应用，准确率最高达 99.07%
items.title_zh: 研究人员通过电磁信号识别手机应用，准确率达99.07%
items.title_en: Researchers identify smartphone apps via EM signals with 99.07% accuracy
items.summary: Researchers demonstrate non-contact identification of smartphone apps via electromagnetic signal leakage with up to 99.07% accuracy.
